headline: CNBC Daily Open: U.S. eyes ground operation as oil execs sound the alarm
summary: The impacts from the Iran war continue to way on global supply chains as economists raise their expectations for a potential recession in the U.S.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess UPS (UPS) After Its Recent Share Price Slide
summary: Wondering if United Parcel Service is a bargain at its recent price, or if the risks outweigh the potential reward, starts with understanding what the market is actually paying for its cash flows and assets. The stock recently closed at US$94.80, with returns of a 1.1% decline over 7 days, an 18.2% decline over 30 days, a 6.2% decline year to date and a 7.6% decline over the last year. That puts recent pricing front and center for anyone considering the shares today. These moves are...

headline: UPS CFO issues stark warning to dividend investors
summary: United Parcel Service investors counting on a dividend raise this year are going to be disappointed. That message came straight from UPS (UPS) CFO Brian Dykes, who made it crystal clear that the shipping giant is freezing its dividend in 2026. For anyone holding UPS as a dividend stock, this ...
